tenant.name: MelpApp
tenant.industry: Enterprise SaaS / Collaboration Software / AI Workspace

brandProfile.industry: Enterprise SaaS / Collaboration Software / AI Workspace
brandProfile.description: MelpApp is a cross-organization collaboration platform that combines messaging, meetings, file management, and AI-powered workflows into a single intelligent workspace. It is designed for teams, enterprises, and organizations that need to collaborate beyond internal boundaries without relying on vendor-locked ecosystems like Microsoft or Google. Melp embeds AI directly into communication, helping users summarize meetings, translate files, generate content, and extract decisions in real time.

services.name: Messaging
services.description: Real-time chat for individuals, teams, and cross-organization collaboration with topic-based conversations

services.name: Meetings
services.description: Audio and video conferencing with integrated AI features like transcription and summaries

services.name: Melp Drive
services.description: Unified file management system that integrates Google Drive and OneDrive into a single interface

services.name: AI File Summary & Q&A
services.description: Automatically summarizes documents and allows users to ask questions based on file content

services.name: AI File Translation
services.description: Translates documents into multiple languages and generates a new translated file

services.name: Live Transcription
services.description: Converts speech into text in real time during meetings

services.name: Meeting Summary
services.description: Extracts key points, decisions, and action items from meetings

services.name: Draft for Me
services.description: AI-generated message drafting and rewriting based on tone and context

services.name: Evaluation Mode
services.description: Monitors interview sessions with behavioral signals and generates interview questions from resumes and job descriptions

policies.title: Data Privacy
policies.content: Melp does not use customer data for training external models. All data remains private to the organization.

policies.title: AI Output Accuracy
policies.content: AI-generated outputs are assistive and should be reviewed before making critical decisions.

policies.title: Third-Party Integrations
policies.content: Users can connect Google Drive and Microsoft OneDrive, but these integrations are optional and not required to use Melp.

policies.title: Account Usage
policies.content: Each user account is tied to a valid identity. Organizations can manage access and permissions internally.

faqs.question: What is Melp?
faqs.answer: Melp is an intelligent workspace that combines messaging, meetings, file management, and AI into a single platform designed for cross-organization collaboration.

faqs.question: How is Melp different from Microsoft Teams or Slack?
faqs.answer: Melp is built for collaboration across organizations and does not require Microsoft or Google identity. It also embeds AI directly into workflows instead of separating it into standalone tools.

faqs.question: Does Melp support file sharing?
faqs.answer: Yes, Melp Drive allows you to store, share, and access files in one place, including integrations with Google Drive and OneDrive.

faqs.question: Can Melp translate documents?
faqs.answer: Yes, Melp can translate documents into multiple languages and create a new translated version of the file.

faqs.question: Does Melp record or summarize meetings?
faqs.answer: Yes, Melp can transcribe meetings in real time and generate summaries including key points, decisions, and action items.

faqs.question: Is Melp suitable for enterprise use?
faqs.answer: Yes, Melp is designed for teams, enterprises, and organizations that need secure and scalable collaboration across boundaries.
